case_title: DAPHNE LIU VS. MARQUITA PATRICE BOME

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, DAPHNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY LIU, DAPHNE AS TO DEFENDANT BOWE, MARQUITA PATRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, DAPHNE
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIU, DAPHNE
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-04-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-06-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOWE, MARQUITA PATRICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2008 - CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PLAINTIFF MUST BRING IN A TRANSLATOR. PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: RUSSELL DAVIS, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER PARKMAN JOE APPEARS ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, DAPHNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWE, MARQUITA PATRICE $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS CORRECTED TO INDICATE DEFENDANT'S NAME: MARQUITA PATRICE BOWE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BOWE, MARQUITA PATRICE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LIU, DAPHNE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
